name: Easy Banana Pudding
recipeIngredient: 3.4 oz pkg instant vanilla pudding mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Line the bottom of a 3-quart glass serving bowl with vanilla wafers in a single layer.
2. Prepare the instant pudding mix according to package directions, using milk and 1/2 cup cream. Stir in 1 tsp vanilla.
3. Layer one-fourth of banana slices over the wafers.
4. Spread evenly one-fourth of the pudding over the bananas.
5. Top with a layer of vanilla wafers.
6. Repeat the layering process, ending with pudding.
7. In a small bowl, beat together remaining 1 1/2 cups cream, 1 tsp vanilla and sugar until soft peaks form.
8. Spoon on top and spread evenly.
9. Loosely cover; refrigerate overnight.
